# familio_person (Data Source)

Look up a single familio.org person by UUID, including the owning account (owner_id) and the person's parents, spouses and children — useful for discovering importable tree nodes and telling your own tree from other researchers' profiles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single person by UUID: its owning account and relationships.
data "familio_person" "ancestor" {
  uuid = "85781e3b-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

# Parent UUIDs you can adopt into your tree with `terraform import`.
output "ancestor_parents" {
  value = data.familio_person.ancestor.parents
}

# Tell your own tree from other researchers' profiles by owner.
output "is_mine" {
  value = data.familio_person.ancestor.owner_id == "894dc7d5"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The familio.org person UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `birth_date` (String) Birth date, as familio formats it (null if unknown).
- `birth_first_name` (String) Given name at birth (maiden).
- `birth_last_name` (String) Surname at birth (maiden).
- `children` (Set of String) UUIDs of this person's children (persons whose birth event lists this person as a parent).
- `christening_date` (String) Christening (baptism) date, as familio formats it (null if unknown).
- `death_date` (String) Death date, as familio formats it (null if unknown).
- `display_name` (String) Server-computed full display name.
- `first_name` (String) Given name (имя).
- `gender` (String) Gender (male/female).
- `last_name` (String) Surname (фамилия).
- `owner_id` (String) UUID of the account that owns this profile (null for catalog-sourced persons). Filter on this to keep only your own tree.
- `parents` (Set of String) UUIDs of this person's parents (from their birth event).
- `patronymic` (String) Patronymic (отчество).
- `privacy` (String) Privacy (visible_for_all/invisible).
- `spouses` (Set of String) UUIDs of this person's spouses (from their wedding events).
